void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns3="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns2="http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response" xmlns:MX2MT="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:QueryGenerator="QueryGenerator" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:nestedjson="nestedjson" xmlns:strings="strings" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math MX2MT QueryGenerator dateConversion myext nestedjson strings"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <ns2:SQL_CFG_1> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:SQL_CFG_1/ns2:spRadaroSelect/ns2:RS1"> <ns2:Radaro_Select> <ns2:MSGID> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:MSGID"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:MSGID> <ns2:MSGTYPE> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:MSGTYPE"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:MSGTYPE> <ns2:DRIVER_ID> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DRIVER_ID"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DRIVER_ID> <ns2:PU> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:PU"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:PU> <ns2:TRAILER> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:TRAILER"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:TRAILER> <ns2:TRIP_NUMBER> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:TRIP_NUMBER"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:TRIP_NUMBER> <ns2:BILL_NUMBER> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:BILL_NUMBER"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:BILL_NUMBER> <ns2:DETAIL_LINE_ID> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DETAIL_LINE_ID"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DETAIL_LINE_ID> <ns2:REFERENCE1> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:REFERENCE1"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:REFERENCE1> <ns2:REFERENCE2> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:REFERENCE2"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:REFERENCE2> <ns2:REFERENCE3> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:REFERENCE3"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:REFERENCE3> <ns2:REFERENCE4> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:REFERENCE4"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:REFERENCE4> <ns2:REFERENCE5> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:REFERENCE5"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:REFERENCE5> <ns2:ORIGIN> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGIN"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGIN> <ns2:ORIGNAME> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGNAME"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGNAME> <ns2:ORIGADDR1> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGADDR1"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGADDR1> <ns2:ORIGADDR2> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGADDR2"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGADDR2> <ns2:ORIGCITY> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGCITY"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGCITY> <ns2:ORIGPROV> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGPROV"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGPROV> <ns2:ORIGPC> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGPC"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGPC> <ns2:ORIGPHONE> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGPHONE"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGPHONE> <ns2:ORIGPHONEEXT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGPHONEEXT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGPHONEEXT> <ns2:DESTINATION> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTINATION"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTINATION> <ns2:DESTNAME> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTNAME"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTNAME> <ns2:DESTADDR1> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTADDR1"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTADDR1> <ns2:DESTADDR2> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTADDR2"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTADDR2> <ns2:DESTCITY> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTCITY"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTCITY> <ns2:DESTPROV> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTPROV"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTPROV> <ns2:DESTPC> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTPC"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTPC> <ns2:DESTPHONE> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTPHONE"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTPHONE> <ns2:DESTPHONEEXT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTPHONEEXT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTPHONEEXT> <ns2:PCS> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:PCS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:PCS> <ns2:WEIGHT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:WEIGHT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:WEIGHT> <ns2:PALLETS> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:PALLETS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:PALLETS> <ns2:PCUNIT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:PCUNIT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:PCUNIT> <ns2:WGTUNIT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:WGTUNIT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:WGTUNIT> <ns2:PLTUNIT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:PLTUNIT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:PLTUNIT> <ns2:ARRIVE_START> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ARRIVE_START"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ARRIVE_START> <ns2:ARRIVE_END> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ARRIVE_END"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ARRIVE_END> <ns2:APPOINTMENT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:APPOINTMENT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:APPOINTMENT> <ns2:NOTE> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:NOTE"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:NOTE> <ns2:RADARO_DRIVER_ID> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:RADARO_DRIVER_ID"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:RADARO_DRIVER_ID> <ns2:RADARO_STATUS> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:RADARO_STATUS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:RADARO_STATUS> <ns2:RADARO_TIMESTAMP> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:RADARO_TIMESTAMP"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:RADARO_TIMESTAMP> <ns2:RADARO_LAT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:RADARO_LAT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:RADARO_LAT> <ns2:RADARO_LONG> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:RADARO_LONG"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:RADARO_LONG> <ns2:RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE> <ns2:DESTEMAIL> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESTEMAIL"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESTEMAIL> <ns2:ORIGEMAIL> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ORIGEMAIL"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ORIGEMAIL> <ns2:DESCRIPTION> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESCRIPTION"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DESCRIPTION> <ns2:ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION> <ns2:LABELS> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:LABELS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:LABELS> <ns2:TMW_STATUS> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:TMW_STATUS"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:TMW_STATUS> <ns2:EXTERNAL_ID> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:EXTERNAL_ID"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:EXTERNAL_ID> <ns2:ADDED> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:ADDED"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:ADDED> <ns2:BAR_CODE> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:BAR_CODE"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:BAR_CODE> <ns2:DIM_DESC> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DESCRIPTION2"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DIM_DESC> <ns2:DIM_UNIT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:DIM_UNIT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DIM_UNIT> <ns2:LENGTH> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:LENGTH"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:LENGTH> <ns2:WIDTH> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:WIDTH"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:WIDTH> <ns2:HEIGHT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:HEIGHT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:HEIGHT> <ns2:DIM_WEIGHT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:WEIGHT2"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:DIM_WEIGHT> <ns2:WEIGHT_UNIT> <xsl:value-of select="./ns2:WEIGHT_UNIT"></xsl:value-of> </ns2:WEIGHT_UNIT> </ns2:Radaro_Select> </xsl:for-each> </ns2:SQL_CFG_1> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response"> <xsd:element name="SQL_CFG_1"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="spRadaroSelect"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="RS1"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="MSGID" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="MSGTYPE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DRIVER_ID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="PU" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="TRAILER" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="TRIP_NUMBER" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="BILL_NUMBER" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DETAIL_LINE_ID" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE3" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE4" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE5" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGIN" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGNAME" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGADDR1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGADDR2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGCITY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPROV" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPC" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPHONE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPHONEEXT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTINATION" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTNAME" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTADDR1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTADDR2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTCITY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPROV" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPC" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPHONE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPHONEEXT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="PCS" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="WEIGHT" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="PALLETS" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="PCUNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="WGTUNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="PLTUNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ARRIVE_START" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="ARRIVE_END" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="APPOINTMENT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="NOTE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_DRIVER_ID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_STATUS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_TIMESTAMP" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_LAT" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_LONG" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTEMAIL" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGEMAIL" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESCRIPTION" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="LABELS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="TMW_STATUS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="EXTERNAL_ID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ADDED" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="BAR_CODE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESCRIPTION2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DIM_UNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="LENGTH" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="WIDTH" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="HEIGHT" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="WEIGHT2" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="WEIGHT_UNIT" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> <xsd:attribute name="id" type="xsd:long" use="optional"/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response"> <xsd:element name="SQL_CFG_1"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="Radaro_Select"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="MSGID" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="MSGTYPE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DRIVER_ID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="PU" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="TRAILER" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="TRIP_NUMBER" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="BILL_NUMBER" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DETAIL_LINE_ID" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE3" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE4" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="REFERENCE5" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGIN" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGNAME" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGADDR1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGADDR2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGCITY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPROV" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPC" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPHONE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGPHONEEXT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTINATION" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTNAME" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTADDR1" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTADDR2" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTCITY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPROV" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPC" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPHONE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTPHONEEXT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="PCS" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="WEIGHT" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="PALLETS" type="xsd:int"/> <xsd:element name="PCUNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="WGTUNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="PLTUNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ARRIVE_START" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="ARRIVE_END" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="APPOINTMENT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="NOTE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_DRIVER_ID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_STATUS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_TIMESTAMP" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_LAT" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_LONG" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESTEMAIL" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ORIGEMAIL" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DESCRIPTION" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="LABELS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="TMW_STATUS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="EXTERNAL_ID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ADDED" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="BAR_CODE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DIM_DESC" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DIM_UNIT" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="LENGTH" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="WIDTH" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="HEIGHT" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="DIM_WEIGHT" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="WEIGHT_UNIT" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> <xsd:attribute name="id" type="xsd:long" use="optional"/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
